reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the Miss America pageant described as the 86th event held at PH Live in Las Vegas.
2. Using that pageant, determine who won it.
original_final_question: Who won Miss America 2013, which was the 86th Miss America pageant held at the PH Live in Las Vegas? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which pageant was the 86th Miss America pageant held at PH Live in Las Vegas? Evidence: Miss America 2013: Miss America 2013, the 86th Miss America pageant, was held at the PH Live on the Las Vegas Strip in Paradise, Nevada on January 12, 2013. -> Miss America 2013

Node 2: Who won Miss America 2013? Evidence: Mallory Hagan: Mallory Hytes Hagan (born December 23, 1988) is an American actress, model and beauty queen who won Miss America 2013 and Miss New York 2012. -> Mallory Hytes Hagan
